model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: alvdansen/littletinies. Research use only. ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

lora._hint: 1.0 = full style strength. Lower values (0.7–0.9) blend with the base SDXL model.

generation._hint: 35–40 steps gives cleaner results. 30 is acceptable for quick previews. | CFG 7–8 per community examples. Higher values push stylisation further. | SDXL native 1024×1024.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates soft, childlike hand-drawn illustrations — charming, simple characters with rounded shapes, pastel tones, and a classic picture-book aesthetic.
notes.prompt_guide: No trigger word needed. Short, simple subject descriptions work best. Examples from model card: 'a tiny witch child', 'a girl wandering through the forest', 'a toad', 'a little fox in the snow'.
